title: Default-on yield on idle balances
quantitative_case: $3.38M sits idle at 0% while lending is the #1 vertical users leave the UI for (Aave 43, Morpho 7, Sky 6, Ether.Fi 6 ≈ 60 external users) — make idle earn by default.

metrics.claim: idle stablecoin balance across the yield cohort
metrics.source_ref: P7 infinex_get_portfolio over cohort.tsv → leakage/parsed.json summary.idle_stable_total (captured 2026-06-01, EVM-only)
P3 connect_transaction GROUP BY dapp → Aave 43 + Morpho 7 + Sky 6 + Ether.Fi 6 (distinct user counts)

caveats: no USD-inflow ledger — net-flow is band-proxy only
probes_run: P3: SELECT d.name, COUNT(DISTINCT c.user_id) FROM connect_transaction c JOIN connect_dapp d ON c.dapp_id=d.id JOIN user u ... WHERE c.requested_at>='2026-02-01' AND <master filter> GROUP BY d.name
P7: projectjin infinex_get_portfolio per cohort account

title: Native fiat off-ramp + reason-to-stay
quantitative_case: Users cash out ~$6.44M/4mo (~$19M/yr) to CEXes in stablecoins, Binance-led ($3.17M) — the #1 real exit.

metrics.source_ref: P1 transfer outflow-by-destination + classify_address → leakage/03-labels.json cex bucket (37 deposit addrs); stablecoins at $1

caveats: no USD-inflow ledger — net-flow is band-proxy only
probes_run: P1: SELECT to_address, chain, SUM(CAST(NULLIF(amount_usd,'') AS DECIMAL(30,2))) usd, COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT sender) FROM transfer t JOIN user u ... WHERE created_at>='2026-02-01' AND status='success' AND is_move=0 AND to_address_type IN('address','addressbook','ens') AND <master filter> GROUP BY to_address, chain ORDER BY usd DESC

title: Native ETH liquid staking
quantitative_case: ETH liquid staking is the only broad-demand yield primitive — ether.fi weETH (17 wallets) + Lido (~10); the rest of deployed yield is whale-concentrated (~1 user per protocol).
caveats: deployed yield is whale-concentrated — broad demand only for ETH LSTs
probes_run: P6 cohort builder + P7 infinex_get_portfolio per account; bucket by protocol

title: Embedded / AA wallet parity
quantitative_case: $2.26M migrates to embedded AA wallets (Bankr/Privy/ZeroDev/Safe, ~35 addrs) — AA-native users who already chose the thesis Infinex is built on.

metrics.claim: outflow to embedded AA wallets (smart_account_wallet bucket excluding ether.fi Cash)
metrics.source_ref: leakage/03-labels.json smart_account_wallet ($26.2M total) minus ether.fi Cash ($23.9M, smart-wallet-classified, not a churn signal)

caveats: smart_account_wallet bucket is dominated by ether.fi Cash ($23.9M) which is NOT consumer churn — separated out

title: Native lending/yield + spot DEX aggregation (L1)
quantitative_case: Top connect verticals leave only the UI — lending (Aave>Morpho>Sky>Ether.Fi) then DEX (Uniswap 16, Jupiter 14, KyberSwap 5); native routing keeps the session and fees on-platform.

metrics.source_ref: P3 connect_transaction → Uniswap 16 + Jupiter 14 + KyberSwap 5 (distinct users)

caveats: funds stay custodied — this is behavioural (L1) leakage, captured by a native feature, not a retention lever
probes_run: P3 connect_transaction GROUP BY dapp, cluster into verticals

title: Native BTC hold/yield
quantitative_case: Users exit the EVM/SVM ecosystem entirely for ~$1.25M of BTC via NEAR Intents (13 destinations).

metrics.source_ref: leakage/03-labels.json btc_destination (13 bc1q addrs; BTC at spot)

caveats: BTC destinations traced via BTC explorer, not Etherscan

title: Perps — defend, don't build
quantitative_case: Synthetix 18 / Hyperliquid 8 / Aster 5 users, but only ~$0.83M L2 outflow — Infinex already ships perps via Synthetix, so this is a UX/discovery gap, not a product gap.

metrics.claim: distinct perps users on external venues
L2 capital outflow attributable to perps
metrics.source_ref: P1 destinations classified to perps venues

caveats: native perps already exist — the gap is discovery/UX, not the product
probes_run: P3 connect_transaction GROUP BY dapp (perps vertical)

title: MM / treasury terms (separate lever)
quantitative_case: Funds/MMs drain via treasury ops, not churn — Wintermute $1.36M, Bodhi $0.71M; address with OTC/treasury terms, not consumer features.
caveats: two-population: this is fund/MM treasury ops, not retail churn — different lever
probes_run: P5 per-user net-flow leaderboard, tagged by email domain (G7)
